audio_log: Hello. Thank you for agreeing to take part in our study.
We'll be using it for this task.
Reattach the lens to the camera.
Next, please remove the lens cover from the camera.
To remove it, please squish on the two plastic brackets.
Thank you very much. Next, please reattach the lens cap.
Thank you very much. Next, please turn on the timer.
Next, please turn off the camera. Thank you very much.
Next, please change the batteries in the camera.
To remove the battery, please open the battery notch.
Thank you very much. Lastly, please change to the SD card and count.
Please look at the camera a bit further from your face, such as what they have within you. Thank you.
Thank you very much. That concludes everything for this class.
